daily_learning_report.description: Send daily learning report at 9 AM

weekly_summary_report.description: Send weekly summary every Monday at 9 AM
weekly_summary_report.command: cd /Users/fhjtech/.openclaw/workspace/email_integration && python3 -c "from learning_integration import LearningEmailIntegrator; i = LearningEmailIntegrator(); i.send_daily_report()"

notes: To enable these cron jobs in OpenClaw:
1. Copy this configuration to your OpenClaw cron settings
2. Ensure Python and required modules are available
